title: xfsprogs bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[6.4.0-7.0.1]
- mkfs.xmem: fix agcount issue when formatting pmem filesystems
- mkfs: add mkfs.xmem wrapper script
- mkfs: add configuration files for OL support

[6.4.0-7]
- xfs unrepairable filesystem if directory block not junked in phase 3 - more
- fixes
- Related: RHEL-54342

[6.4.0-6]
- xfs unrepairable filesystem if directory block not junked in phase 3
- Related: RHEL-54342
full_text:
[6.4.0-7.0.1]
- mkfs.xmem: fix agcount issue when formatting pmem filesystems
- mkfs: add mkfs.xmem wrapper script
- mkfs: add configuration files for OL support

[6.4.0-7]
- xfs unrepairable filesystem if directory block not junked in phase 3 - more
- fixes
- Related: RHEL-54342

[6.4.0-6]
- xfs unrepairable filesystem if directory block not junked in phase 3
- Related: RHEL-54342
